name: Ametek, Inc.
lede: Ametek runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mumbai, covering CoE and engineering & design, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ametek office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ametek, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ametek runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai), covering CoE and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Head of Cloud Architecture | AWS | Multi-tenant | Internet of Things | Cybersecurity

about.description: Ametek's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Mumbai, spanning CoE and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twelve decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Ametek operate in India?
faq.a: Ametek operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Ametek have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Ametek's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Ametek run in India?
faq.a: Ametek runs CoE and engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Ametek's India GCCs?
faq.a: Ametek's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Ametek's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Ametek's India centers, across Finance, IT, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
